reasoning:
The question asks whether Solana (SOLUSDT on Binance) will hit an all-time high between Jan 21, 2025 and June 30, 2025. The all-time high of Solana was reached around January 19, 2025, with prices briefly touching as high as ~$293 on Binance. Since then, the price has generally trended downward. Throughout May 2025, Solana's price has been hovering significantly lower, trading in the $140–$170 range. To hit a new ATH by June 30, prices would need to essentially double (rally by ~70–90%) within a span of ~5 weeks. 

Given the cryptocurrency market conditions, the sheer magnitude of the required price movement within a very short remaining timeframe (slightly more than a month) makes this outcome incredibly unlikely unless there is an exogenous, unprecedented bullish event. The prediction market pricing reflects this reality: the latest accessible Polymarket price signals roughly a 1% probability of Solana hitting a new ATH by the June 30 deadline. Considering the overwhelming spread between current levels and the target, along with the market consensus, the true probability is at the floor of acceptable forecasts. I am assigning a 2% chance, balancing the very low baseline probability against the inherent extreme volatility of crypto markets within a 5-week timeframe.
